top_signals.title: The Supreme Court is 'Unquestionably an Ideological Court' Says Wydra
top_signals.summary: A closely divided US Supreme Court reinforced the Federal Reserve’s independence from the White House, protecting governors from being fired by the president without proof of wrongdoing. Elizabeth Wydra, President of the Constitutional Accountability Center joins to discuss the Supreme Court decisions released today. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Private Credit Fund Sells $350 Million Bond
top_signals.summary: A Morgan Stanley private credit fund sold investment-grade bonds to refinance debt, its first offering in just over a year.

top_signals.title: Eldorado-Vantage Merger Signals Continued Offshore Drilling Consolidation
top_signals.summary: On 29 May 2026, Vantage Drilling International and Eldorado Drilling signed a merger agreement under which Eldorado will acquire Vantage, making it a wholly owned subsidiary. As part of the transaction, Vantage shareholders will receive $19 per share in cash…
